name: 内格夫 | 原型机
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been custom painted in white and red, a temporary paint job while its design is finalized. v1.2.1, PAT. 3422107
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 采用了红白颜色的自定义涂装，这是设计完成后立即完成的临时喷涂。 v1.2.1, PAT. 3422107
